options.name: Beast
options.description: Shaped into animals — feral, instinctive, in touch with nature.
options.blessing: 9-again on Animal Ken; free Specialty in one animal type.
options.curse: –4 untrained penalty on Mental Skills with no dots.

options.name: Darkling
options.description: Creatures of shadow taken as spies and messengers.
options.blessing: Spend Glamour to add 9-again on Wits, Subterfuge, or Stealth pools.
options.curse: –1 to Contract rolls in daylight; –2 if sun is directly visible.

options.name: Elemental
options.description: Bound to the forces of earth, air, fire, or water.
options.blessing: Once per day, spend 1 Glamour to add Wyrd rating to Health dots.
options.curse: No 10-again on Manipulation + Empathy, Expression, Persuasion, or Socialize.

options.name: Fairest
options.description: The beautiful ones — taken as trophies and entertainers.
options.blessing: Spend Glamour to gain 9-again on Presence, Manipulation, and Persuasion pools.

options.name: Ogre
options.description: Brutes taken as warriors, guards, and enforcers.
options.blessing: Spend Glamour to add dice to Strength, Brawl, and Intimidate pools.
options.curse: No 10-again on Composure pools (except Perception); –1 Composure using Fists defensively.

options.name: Wizened
options.description: Craftsmen and functionaries — small, clever, precise.
options.blessing: Spend 1 Glamour to gain 9-again on all Dexterity pools for the scene.
options.curse: No 10-again on Presence pools; –2 untrained penalty on Social Skills with no dots.

options.name: Spring Court
options.description: Court of Desire — fight fear through hope and longing.

options.name: Summer Court
options.description: Court of Wrath — fight fear through anger and valor.

options.name: Autumn Court
options.description: Court of Fear — use fear as your weapon.

options.name: Winter Court
options.description: Court of Sorrow — hide by becoming invisible and still.

options.name: Courtless
options.description: Beholden to no Court — free but without seasonal protection.

powers.label: Contracts
powers.description: Spend 5 dots across Contracts. Universal Contracts are open to all changelings. Seeming Contracts are tied to your Seeming; Court Contracts to your Court — but any Contract can be learned.

clauses.name: Pathfinder
clauses.description: The changeling divines the nature of the Hedge in a certain area, finding Hollows, trods, paths to and from Faerie, and details of the local Hedge.

clauses.name: Forcing the Dream
clauses.description: The changeling becomes director of a subject's dreams, controlling and directing a sleeper's dreams without means of a pledge.

clauses.name: Cobble-Hought
clauses.description: The changeling reaches into a subject's dreams and extracts an item or image from them that then exists or plays out in the real world.

clauses.name: Phantasmal Bastion
clauses.description: This clause bolsters the changeling's ability to withstand conflicts with other changelings in the dreamscape by conjuring an elaborate suit of armor.

clauses.name: Dreamsteps
clauses.description: The changeling climbs into a nearby sleeper's dreams and emerges near another sleeper, using the landscape of dreams as a proxy for physical travel.

clauses.name: Fickle Fate
clauses.description: The subject makes the roll for his next actively attempted instant action at a –2 dice penalty.

clauses.name: Favored Fate
clauses.description: The beneficiary makes the roll for his next actively attempted instant action at a +4 dice bonus.

clauses.name: Beneficent Fate
clauses.description: The subject makes no roll for his next actively attempted instant action and automatically achieves a single success.

clauses.name: Fortuna's Cornucopia
clauses.description: The beneficiary makes the roll for his next actively attempted instant action under the benefit of the 8-again rule.

clauses.name: Triumphal Fate
clauses.description: The recipient achieves an exceptional success on an action designated by the changeling, and only one unit of time is required.

clauses.name: Riddle-Kith
clauses.description: The changeling appears as if she hails from another kith or seeming, creating the general impression of a certain seeming.

clauses.name: Skinmask
clauses.description: The changeling alters her flesh to appear as another individual, affecting only a single limb or aspect such as hands, face, or back.

clauses.name: Transfigure the Flesh
clauses.description: The changeling adjusts the size of her body, either shrinking or growing; Size increases or decreases by successes rolled.

clauses.name: Oddbody
clauses.description: The changeling re-aligns her body so that one feature becomes something other than human, such as forming bestial claws or elongating legs.

clauses.name: Chrysalis
clauses.description: The changeling becomes something wholly other than herself, taking the shape of any inanimate object roughly her size and becoming that object.

clauses.name: The Wrong Foot
clauses.description: The changeling changes the nature of the marks he leaves when passing through a locale, leaving evidence resembling something other than human visitation.

clauses.name: Nevertread
clauses.description: All traces of the changeling's passing vanish — no footprints in mud, sand, snow, or water.

clauses.name: Shadow Pact
clauses.description: Light seems to avoid the changeling and darkness congeals around him, granting a +3 dice bonus to Stealth-based dice pools.

clauses.name: Murkblur
clauses.description: The changeling creates a smoky caul over the eyes of a subject, effectively blinding her to all but very bright sources of light.

clauses.name: Light-Shy
clauses.description: This clause grants the ultimate power of the Smoke purview, making the changeling truly invisible even to mechanical observers such as security cameras.

clauses.name: Brief Glamour of Repair
clauses.description: Without tools or spare parts, the changeling can repair an object where more than half of the device remains intact.

clauses.name: Touch of the Workman's Wrath
clauses.description: The character can disable or seriously damage a device or vehicle with a single touch.

clauses.name: Blessing of Perfection
clauses.description: By briefly handling and adjusting a weapon or device, the changeling blesses an object, making it significantly easier to use.

clauses.name: Unmaker's Destructive Gaze
clauses.description: The character stares hard at a vehicle, weapon, or device, causing the object to cease working until repaired or restarted.

clauses.name: Tatterdemalion's Workshop
clauses.description: The character creates a complex and useful device out of unlikely parts — a hovercraft from a motorcycle engine and an inflatable air mattress.

clauses.name: Creeping Dread
clauses.description: This clause causes affected targets to become considerably more susceptible to anything that could trigger phobia derangement.

clauses.name: Night's Subtle Distractions
clauses.description: The Lost avoids notice by enhancing physical conditions that limit perception — making darkness darker and background noises more obscuring.

clauses.name: Balm of Unwakeable Slumber
clauses.description: All sleeping targets the changeling can see or hear become nearly impossible to wake, remaining asleep through loud noises and physical disturbance unless harmed.

clauses.name: Boon of the Scuttling Spider
clauses.description: The changeling can run along any solid surface — wall or ceiling — like a scuttling spider, gaining full Defense while moving.

clauses.name: Touch of Paralyzing Shudder
clauses.description: The character fills the target with involuntary shudders of fear and revulsion, halving Speed, Defense, Initiative, and all Strength and Dexterity pools.

clauses.name: Cloak of the Elements
clauses.description: The changeling becomes comfortable in weather associated with one element and is protected against damage from its more extreme manifestations.

clauses.name: Armor of the Elements' Fury
clauses.description: The character clothes himself in a frenzied manifestation of his chosen element, providing armor and damaging anyone who touches him.

clauses.name: Control Elements
clauses.description: The changeling takes control of the element attuned to the Contract, causing it to move and act in a directed fashion within range.

clauses.name: Calling the Element
clauses.description: The changeling calls the associated element from a distant location, with the element physically moving toward the character.

clauses.name: Become the Primal Foundation
clauses.description: The changeling literally becomes a living manifestation of the Contract's associated element, taking only one turn to transform.

clauses.name: Tongues of Birds and Words of Wolves
clauses.description: The changeling can communicate with the general type of animal represented in the Contract, partially empathic but requiring whispers or animal sounds.

clauses.name: Beast's Keen Senses
clauses.description: The changeling gains the senses of a specific type of animal — enhanced natural senses, and may gain entirely new senses such as infrared pits or echolocation.

clauses.name: Aspect of the Beast
clauses.description: The changeling takes on a specific aspect of his animal type — a cat's flexibility, a bear's strength — for the rest of the scene.

clauses.name: Tread of the Swift Hooves
clauses.description: The character gains the Contracted animal's mode of locomotion — doubling Speed for runners, effortless swimming, quadrupled jumping for flyers, or five-times climbing speed.

clauses.name: Cloak of the Bear's Massive Form
clauses.description: The changeling can physically transform into the animal bound to the Contract, retaining all Mental and Social Attributes and Skills while gaining the animal's Physical traits.

clauses.name: Might of the Terrible Brute
clauses.description: The character's muscles ripple with added power, enhancing Strength through brute determination.

clauses.name: Ogre's Rending Grasp
clauses.description: The character can focus his inhuman prowess against inanimate objects, ripping down walls or bashing in doors with ease.

clauses.name: Display Grandiose Might
clauses.description: The character can boost his Strength significantly for non-combat tasks — running, climbing, jumping, and lifting far more effectively.

clauses.name: Gluttonous Feast of Health
clauses.description: The character can heal damage through consumption of prodigious amounts of food and drink, regardless of quality.

clauses.name: Red Race of Terrible Revenge
clauses.description: The changeling is filled with fury, gaining unparalleled Strength and resistance to harm through transformed rage.

clauses.name: Mask of Superiority
clauses.description: The changeling convinces a single subject that she is his professional superior or someone of superior social status.

clauses.name: Songs of Distant Arcadia
clauses.description: The changeling becomes a consummate performer, acting as a skilled storyteller or inhumanly eloquent speaker.

clauses.name: Splendor of the Envoy's Protection
clauses.description: The changeling uses this clause at formal gatherings to appear simultaneously impressive and difficult to harm, revealing her true mien to all present.

clauses.name: Mantle of Terrible Beauty
clauses.description: The changeling appears terrifying and wonderful; attackers are filled with awe but cannot later remember her exact appearance.

clauses.name: Words of Memories Never Lived
clauses.description: The changeling gives a profoundly affecting speech or performance that warps listeners' memories and understanding of events within 50 yards.

clauses.name: Cupid's Eye
clauses.description: The clause reveals what a person truly desires — the first step in fulfilling their deepest wants.

clauses.name: Spend the Idle Hours
clauses.description: The character creates a sense of ease and contentment in a subject, lowering their defenses and making them more open to suggestion.

clauses.name: Wyrd-Faced Stranger
clauses.dice: Presence + Subterfuge + Mantle (Spring) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The changeling appears as whoever the subject most desires to see at that moment.

clauses.name: Pandora's Gift
clauses.description: The changeling creates an object that another person truly desires out of emotion, dreamstuff, and random materials.

clauses.name: Waking the Inner Faerie
clauses.dice: Intelligence + Expression + Mantle (Spring) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The changeling makes a target pursue his greatest desires, regardless of other considerations.

clauses.name: Gift of Warm Breath
clauses.description: The character's power rejuvenates a single living target, filling them with energy and vigorous life.

clauses.name: New Lover's Kiss
clauses.description: The character calls rain down from even a cloudless sky through five minutes of imploring.

clauses.name: Warmth of the Blood
clauses.description: The power of Spring channels into a person's body, mending wounds — each success downgrades one lethal to bashing, or removes one bashing wound entirely.

clauses.name: Yesterday's Birth
clauses.description: The changeling endows a living object or creature with a season's worth of growth and maturing instantly.

clauses.name: Mother of All Deaths
clauses.description: The character makes the region extraordinarily verdant and rouses it to fight on her behalf.

clauses.name: Baleful Sense
clauses.description: The character senses the greatest source of wrath nearby.

clauses.name: Goblin's Malignance
clauses.dice: Manipulation + Persuasion + Mantle (Summer) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The character redirects the subject's wrath onto a new target, most likely himself.

clauses.name: Friendless Tongue
clauses.dice: Manipulation + Subterfuge + Mantle (Summer) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The character incites a person to uncontrollable wrath through innocent-seeming conversation.

clauses.name: Sundown Eyes
clauses.description: The character appears in terrible fae mien, causing observers to lose memory of her exact appearance but remember the terror.

clauses.name: The Flames of Summer
clauses.description: The character drives his anger into the realm of rage, becoming impossible to disturb and gaining extra strength.

clauses.name: Son of the Hearth
clauses.description: The character is comfortable in all temperatures and may even heat a chamber with his power.

clauses.name: Ulf's Heart
clauses.description: The character shines the light of high Summer on his surroundings.

clauses.name: Noonday Grasp
clauses.description: The character borrows some of Summer's immense strength to increase his own.

clauses.name: Solstice Revelation
clauses.description: The changeling reveals all that is hidden around him by channeling the light of the sun at its most intense.

clauses.name: The Lord's Dread Gaze
clauses.description: The changeling serves his enemies with destructive sunlight channeled from the relentless Summer sun.

clauses.name: Witch's Intuition
clauses.description: The character dredges knowledge of one fear from the subject's mind or subconscious.

clauses.name: Tale of the Baba Yaga
clauses.description: Through conversation or oratory, the character instills a concept as supernaturally frightening.

clauses.name: Heart of the Antlion
clauses.description: The character uses her Contract with Autumn to steel herself against all manner of fear, natural or supernatural.

clauses.name: Scent of the Harvest
clauses.description: The character reassures friends and allies, protecting them against fear just as she protects herself.

clauses.name: Mien of the Baba Yaga
clauses.description: The character takes on the aspect of one of her subject's greatest fears.

clauses.name: Last Breath Bliss
clauses.description: The character brings a plant to its ripest point ready for harvest, allowing collection of beneficial fruits.

clauses.name: Withering Glare
clauses.description: The character can wither any plant to any degree with a glance and sicken animals that cross her gaze.

clauses.name: Brother to the Ague
clauses.description: The changeling inflicts diseases and decay upon an enemy as the life of the world wanes with Autumn.

clauses.name: Riding the Falling Leaves
clauses.description: The changeling becomes a temporary avatar of Autumn, transforming into a colorful spray of dry leaves.

clauses.name: Tears of Autumn
clauses.description: The character calls a hailstorm from the sky, ranging from light harassment to heavy damage.

clauses.name: The Dragon Knows
clauses.description: The character can tell why a person is sorrowful, guessing her regrets with just a glance.

clauses.name: Slipknot Dreams
clauses.description: The changeling forces a person to forget about her sorrows just long enough to deal with the moment at hand.

clauses.name: Faces in the Water
clauses.description: The subject remembers a sad memory from her past and dwells on it, filling herself with sorrow.

clauses.name: Fallow Fields, Empty Harvest
clauses.dice: Manipulation + Intimidation + Mantle (Winter) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The character eliminates a person's ability to experience positive emotions for a period of time.

clauses.name: Every Sorrow a Jewel
clauses.dice: Manipulation + Persuasion + Mantle (Winter) vs. Composure + Wyrd
clauses.description: The character magnifies the emotions of a sorrowful person to such extremes that they become incapable of any action.

clauses.name: Jack's Breath
clauses.description: The character cools a room considerably or an area roughly the size of a room.

clauses.name: Touch of Winter
clauses.description: Liquid freezes with just a caress of the changeling's fingertips.

clauses.name: Riding the Devil's Jawbone
clauses.description: The character surrounds himself with a freezing aura that penalizes all within 20 feet by –1 die per action, increasing with time spent inside it.

clauses.name: Fallen from the Timbers
clauses.description: The character calls a great shaft of cold air and frozen particles down upon an enemy, inflicting lethal damage equal to successes and imposing a –1 die penalty for the scene.

clauses.name: Witch's Paradise
clauses.description: The changeling summons a lasting snowstorm — five successes creates light flurries over a one-mile radius for one hour; additional successes add severity, radius, or duration.
